side_effects.description: Got hot and itchy and wheezy on second-to-last dose; on final dose hands and face swollen, tingly, itchy, on fire, then intense abdominal cramping like period cramps as reaction calmed
Swollen hands and face, tingling, felt like fighting for life; intense abdominal cramping following reaction

protocol_notes: Used sermorelin without issues initially; last two doses caused progressively worsening reactions. Will not use sermorelin again.
